title: senecio marginalis
intro: Senecio marginalis, also known as Gray Rabbit's Breath, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio marginalis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
